response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role requires 8 years of C++ as a hard minimum, plus 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems and cloud compute platform expertise. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and no demonstrated cloud compute platform or distributed-systems leadership at the required scale. Skills section also omits C++.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded
Some distributed/low-latency exposure at Dunnhumby (DLang microservices)
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ minimum; only brief NI C/C++ experience
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale infra leadership
No formal tech-lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / distributed systems scale
